prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for furan using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', PySCF). Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral) with charged states (cation and anion, multiplicity 2 each) computed to define the Fukui function via finite-difference Mulliken partial charges. All three SCF calculations converged successfully. The most electrophilic site (highest f⁺) is C4 or C5 (α-carbons) with f⁺ = 1.924, and the most nucleophilic site (highest f⁻) is also C4 or C5 with f⁻ = 0.162. Charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0, sum f⁻ = 1.0), confirming valid state convergence. Full per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) reported in the table above. No warnings.
